title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that while the US leads in AI chips, models, and applications, China has structural advantages in power generation and transmission that enable larger-scale AI data centers. The analysis contrasts centralized Chinese mandates with fragmented US federal, state, and local governance, highlighting how energy infrastructure shapes AI buildout capacity.
